---
title: "i_space"
author: Jascha Grübel
date: 2024-10-22
---

# iSPACE

## Setup

```{r}
if (!require("pacman")) install.packages("pacman")
pacman::p_load("readxl","tidyverse","lme4","AER","nlme","lmerTest","randomForest","caret","robustbase","robustlmm","lavaan","semPlot","tidyr","broom","lavaanPlot","tidySEM","fastDummies","texreg","StanHeaders", "rstan","blavaan","remotes","corrplot") 

if(Sys.info()["sysname"] == "Darwin"){#is on Mac
  #remotes::install_github("coatless-mac/macrtools")
  #macrtools::macos_rtools_install()
} else {
  warning("PLEASE INSTALL STAN FOR WINDOWS: Install RTools43 following the instructions here: https://cran.r-project.org/bin/windows/Rtools/rtools43/rtools.html")
}

```

Functions

```{r}
`%notin%` <- Negate(`%in%`)

coalesce_join <- function(x, 
                          y, 
                          by = NULL, 
                          keep = c("left", "right"), # "left" means keep value from left table if values exist in both tables.
                          suffix = c(".x", ".y"), # Same as the suffix argument in dplyr joins. 
                          join = c("full_join","left_join", "right_join", "inner_join") # Choose a join type from the list. The default is full_join.
                          ) { 
  keep = match.arg(keep) 
  join = match.arg(join) 
  join = match.fun(join) # Confirm the join argument is in the list and match the string to the function
  
  # Depends on the keep argument, overwrite the duplicate value
  # If keep = "left", the value from the left table will be kept, vice versa.
  if (keep == "left") suffix_ = suffix else suffix_ = rev(suffix)
  
  join(x, y, by = by, suffix = suffix) %>% 
    mutate(
      across( # Apply the coalesce function to all overlapped columns
        ends_with(suffix_[1]), # Select columns ended with .x if keep = "left"; or .y if keep = "right"
        ~coalesce(.,
                  get(str_replace(cur_column(), suffix_[1], suffix_[2])) # Replace .x in var.x with .y to generate var.y, if keep = "left"; or vice versa.
        ),
        .names = "{str_remove(.col, suffix_[1])}" # Remove the suffix from the combined columns
      ),
      .keep = "unused") # Remove the temporary columns ended with suffix
  }
```

### Load data

```{r}
eye.tracking.data<-read_csv(file = "ET_results_with_AOI.csv") %>%
  mutate(StartTime = as_datetime(StartTime),
         EndTime = as_datetime(EndTime),
         Phase = case_when(Task=="Path Integration" & is.na(Phase)~"Movement",
                           Task=="Perspective Taking" & is.na(Phase)~"Rotating",
                           Task=="Egocentric pointing" & is.na(Phase)~"Pointing",
                           T~Phase)) %>%
  group_by(Name,Task) %>%
    mutate(index = which(Phase=="HomingMultiLegs")[1],
           row = row_number(),
           Phase = case_when(row>=index & Phase == "Transition"~"HomingMultiLegs", 
                             row>=index & !is.na(Trial) ~ "Transition",T~Phase),
           Trial = case_when(row>=index~lag(Trial,default=NA),
                             Task=="Perspective Taking"~paste(Trial,Leg),
                             T~Trial),
           Leg = case_when(Task=="Perspective Taking"~as.character((row-1)/2),
                           T~Leg))%>%
  filter(Task != "Training" | row!=index)%>%
  select(-row,-index)
moca.data<-read_xlsx(path = "data/EyeT_RawMoCAScore.xlsx")
demographics.data<-read_xlsx(path = "data/EyeT_Demographic.xlsx")

mapping.data <- read_rds(file = "data/mapping_meta_data.RDS") %>% 
  mutate(Task = "Mapping")
memory.data <- read_rds(file = "data/memory_meta_data.RDS") %>% 
  mutate(Task = "Memory") 
path.integration.data <- read_rds(file = "data/trial_meta_data_path_integration.RDS") %>% 
  mutate(Task = "Path Integration")
perspective.taking.data <- read_rds(file = "data/trial_meta_data_perspective_taking.RDS") %>% 
  mutate(Task = "Perspective Taking")%>%
              mutate(TrialOld = Trial,
                     Trial = paste(Landmark.Facing,Landmark.Target),
                     Phase = Landmark.Start)
pointing.data <- read_rds(file = "data/pointing_trial_meta_data.RDS") %>% 
  group_by(File, ID, Name,Trial)%>%
  summarise(Task = "Egocentric pointing",
         Average_Pointing_Error = mean(Unsigned_Error),
         Average_Pointing_Error_signed = mean(Signed_Error),
         From_Landmark = unique(From_Landmark)[1])%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  distinct()
training.data <- read_rds(file = "data/training_phases_meta_data.RDS") %>%
  rename(`Total Duration`=Duration) %>% 
  left_join(read_rds(file = "data/training_phase_one_meta_data.RDS") %>% 
              mutate(Phase = "Rotation"), 
            join_by(File,Name,ID, Phase) )%>% 
  coalesce_join(read_rds(file = "data/training_phase_two_meta_data.RDS") %>% 
              mutate(Phase = "Movement",
                     Trial = paste(Trial))%>%
                select(-Task), 
            join_by(File,Name,ID, Phase) ,
            keep = "left",
            join = "left_join")%>% 
  coalesce_join(read_rds(file = "data/training_phase_five_meta_data.RDS") %>% 
              mutate(Phase = "HomingMultiLegs",
                     Count = 3,
                     Duration = Time) %>%
                uncount(Count)%>%
                mutate(
                     Trial = paste0("T",as.character(Trial),".L",c("1","2","3")))%>%
                select(-Time) , 
            join_by(File,Name,ID, Phase) ,
            keep = "left",
            join = "left_join")  %>% 
  mutate(Task = "Training")

space.data <- mapping.data %>%
  full_join(memory.data%>% 
              rename("totalTime"="TotalTime"), 
            by = join_by(File, Name, ID,StartTime,EndTime,Task,totalTime)) %>%
  full_join(path.integration.data %>% rename("totalTime"="Time")%>%
              mutate(Trial = as.character(Trial),
                     Phase = "Movement"), 
            by = join_by(File, Name, ID, Task,totalTime)) %>%
  full_join(perspective.taking.data %>% 
              rename("totalTime"="TotalTime") , 
            by = join_by(File, Name, ID, Phase, StartTime, EndTime, Task, totalTime, Trial)) %>%
  full_join(pointing.data %>%
              mutate(Trial = as.character(Trial),
                     Phase = "Pointing"), 
            by = join_by(File, Name, ID, Task, Trial, Phase)) %>% 
  full_join(training.data%>%
              rename("totalTime"="Duration")%>%
              mutate(Trial = as.character(Trial)),
            by = join_by(File, Name, ID, Task, Trial, Phase, Distance, PIDistance, PIRatio, PIDistanceError, PIAngle, PIAngleError, FinalX,
FinalY, Landmark1, Landmark2, TimeRocketLandmark1, TimeLandmark1Landmark2, TimeLandmark2Rocket, DistanceRocketLandmark1,
DistanceLandmark1Landmark2, DistanceLandmark2Rocket,totalTime))%>%
  mutate(Name = as.numeric(Name),
         Name = case_when(Name == 32~326,T~Name))
```

### Merge data

```{r}
all.data <- bind_rows(
  eye.tracking.data %>% 
    filter((Task=="Mapping" & Name != 282) |
             (Task == "Memory" & !(Name == 282 | Name == 303))) %>%
    group_by(Name,Task) %>% 
    mutate(StartTime = min(StartTime,na.rm = T),
           EndTime = max(EndTime,na.rm = T),
           blink_count = sum(blink_count,na.rm = T),
           average_blink_duration = sum(average_blink_duration,na.rm = T)/n(),
           max_blink_duration=max(max_blink_duration,na.rm = T),
           saccadic_count = sum(saccadic_count,na.rm=T),
           average_saccadic_duration = sum(average_saccadic_duration,na.rm = T)/n(),
           maximum_saccadic_duration = case_when(sum(average_saccadic_duration,na.rm = T)==0~-1,
                                                 T~max(maximum_saccadic_duration,na.rm = T)),
           fixation_count = sum(fixation_count,na.rm=T),
           average_fixation_duration = sum(average_fixation_duration,na.rm = T)/n(),
           maximum_fixation_duration = max(maximum_fixation_duration,na.rm = T),
           gaze_entropy = max(gaze_entropy, na.rm = T),
           L_slope = median(L_slope,na.rm = T),
           L_max = max(L_max, na.rm = T),
           L_mean = mean(L_mean, na.rm = T),
           L_entropy = max(L_entropy, na.rm = T),
           L_variation = max(L_variation, na.rm = T),
           R_slope = median(R_slope,na.rm = T),
           R_max = max(R_max, na.rm = T),
           R_mean = mean(R_mean, na.rm = T),
           R_variation = max(R_variation, na.rm = T),
           R_entropy = max(R_entropy, na.rm = T),
           Phase = NA_character_,
           Trial = NA_character_,
           Leg = NA_character_,
           ) %>% 
    distinct(),
  eye.tracking.data %>% filter(Task!="Mapping" & Task!= "Memory"))%>%
  left_join(demographics.data, join_by(Name==`Player_Name`)) %>%
  left_join(moca.data %>%mutate(`Subject ID` = as.double(`Subject ID`)),  # Convert to double
    join_by(Name == `Subject ID`)
  ) %>%
  coalesce_join(space.data %>% select(-StartTime,-EndTime), by = join_by(Name, Task, Phase, Trial),
            keep = "left",
            join = "left_join")
```

### Clean data

```{r}
clean.data <- all.data %>% ungroup() %>%
  mutate(Interviewer = case_when(Interviewer_name=="Eunice"~1,
                                 Interviewer_name=="Giorgio"~2,
                                 Interviewer_name=="Karolina"~3,
                                 Interviewer_name=="Sophia"~4,
                                 T~-1),
         Falls_number = case_when(is.na(Falls_number)~0,T~Falls_number),
         Aid_strength_left = case_when(is.na(Aid_strength_left)~0,T~Aid_strength_left),
         Aid_strength_right = case_when(is.na(Aid_strength_right)~0,T~Aid_strength_right),
         isTransition = case_when(!str_detect(Task,">")&Phase=="Transition"~"Transition",
                                  str_detect(Task,">")~"Transition",
                                  T~"Task"),
         Participant = as.factor(Name),
         scaled_blink_count = as.numeric(scale(blink_count)),
         scaled_MoCA = as.numeric(scale(MoCA)),
         binary_MoCA = case_when(MoCA>25~"normal",
                                 T~"impaired"),
         StartTime = as_datetime(StartTime),
         EndTime = as_datetime(EndTime),
         Duration = as.duration(interval(StartTime,EndTime)),
         ) %>% 
  group_by(Name,Task) %>%
  fill(Trial,Leg, .direction = "down") %>%
  replace_na(list(Trial = "",Leg = ""))%>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(Segment = str_trim(paste(Task,Phase,Trial,Leg,sep=" ")),
         memory.sum = sum(Move.Duration.Egg+
                                             Move.Duration.Fossil+
                                             Move.Duration.Fruit+
                                             Move.Duration.Gems+
                                             Move.Duration.Rock+
                                             Move.Duration.Water,na.rm = T),
         PerformanceSum =case_when(
           !is.na(Euc.R2)~1-Euc.R2,
           !is.na(Move.Duration.Egg)~(memory.sum-min(memory.sum,na.rm=T) / (max(memory.sum,na.rm = T)-min(memory.sum,na.rm = T))),
           !is.na(Calculated_Robot_Angle)~Calculated_Robot_Angle/180,
           Task=="Training"&Phase=="Movement"~as.numeric(totalTime)/max(as.numeric(totalTime),na.rm = T),
           isTransition=="Transition"~as.numeric(Duration)/max(as.numeric(Duration),na.rm = T),
           Task=="Training"&Phase=="HomingMultiLegs"~(PIDistance/max(PIDistance,na.rm = T)+abs(PIAngleError)/180)/2,
           Task=="Path Integration"&Phase=="Movement"~(PIDistance/max(PIDistance,na.rm = T)+abs(PIAngleError)/180)/2,
           Task=="Egocentric pointing"&Phase=="Pointing"~Average_Pointing_Error/180,
           Task=="Perspective Taking"&isTransition=="Task"~ErrorMeasure/180),
         PerformanceLog =case_when(
           !is.na(Euc.R2)~log(abs(Euc.R2)+1),
           !is.na(Move.Duration.Egg)~log(Move.Duration.Egg+
                                             Move.Duration.Fossil+
                                             Move.Duration.Fruit+
                                             Move.Duration.Gems+
                                             Move.Duration.Rock+
                                             Move.Duration.Water+1),
           !is.na(Calculated_Robot_Angle)~log(Calculated_Robot_Angle+1),
           Task=="Training"&Phase=="Movement"~log(as.numeric(totalTime)+1),
           isTransition=="Transition"~log(as.numeric(Duration)+1),
           Task=="Training"&Phase=="HomingMultiLegs"~log(abs(PIRatio)+1)+log(PIAngleError+1),
           Task=="Path Integration"&Phase=="Movement"~log(abs(PIRatio)+1)+log(PIAngleError+1),
           Task=="Egocentric pointing"&Phase=="Pointing"~log(abs(Average_Pointing_Error)+1),
           Task=="Perspective Taking"&isTransition=="Task"~log(abs(ErrorMeasure)+1)),
         Performance = -case_when(
           !is.na(Euc.R2)~-scale(log(abs(Euc.R2)+1),center=F)[,1],
           !is.na(Move.Duration.Egg)~scale(log(Move.Duration.Egg+
                                             Move.Duration.Fossil+
                                             Move.Duration.Fruit+
                                             Move.Duration.Gems+
                                             Move.Duration.Rock+
                                             Move.Duration.Water+1),center=F)[,1],
           !is.na(Calculated_Robot_Angle)~scale(log(abs(Calculated_Robot_Angle)+1),center=F)[,1],
           Task=="Training"&Phase=="Movement"~scale(log(totalTime+1),center=F)[,1],
           isTransition=="Transition"~scale(log(`Duration`+1))[,1],
           Task=="Training"&Phase=="HomingMultiLegs"~scale(
             scale(log(abs(PIRatio)+1),center=F)[,1]+
               scale(log(abs(PIAngleError)+1),center=F)[,1])[,1],
           Task=="Path Integration"&Phase=="Movement"~scale(
             scale(log(abs(PIRatio)+1),center=F)[,1]+
               scale(log(abs(PIAngleError)+1),center=F)[,1])[,1],
           Task=="Egocentric pointing"&Phase=="Pointing"~scale(log(abs(Average_Pointing_Error)+1),center=F)[,1],
           Task=="Perspective Taking"&isTransition=="Task"~scale(log(abs(ErrorMeasure)+1),center=F)[,1],
           T~NA),
         mean_blink_count = blink_count/as.numeric(Duration),
         mean_fixation_count = fixation_count/as.numeric(Duration),
         mean_saccadic_count = saccadic_count/as.numeric(Duration)
         )%>%
  select(Participant,
         StartTime,
         EndTime,
         Duration,
         Task,
         Phase,
         Segment,
         isTransition,
         Performance,
         PerformanceLog,
         PerformanceSum,
         MoCA = `FINAL SCORE`,
         scaled_MoCA,
         binary_MoCA,
         blink_count,
         mean_blink_count,
         scaled_blink_count,
         average_blink_duration,
         max_blink_duration,
         saccadic_count,
         mean_saccadic_count,
         average_saccadic_duration,
         maximum_saccadic_duration,
         fixation_count,
         mean_fixation_count,
         average_fixation_duration,
         maximum_fixation_duration,
         gaze_entropy,
         STE=ste,
         GTE=gte,
         BA,
         L_slope,
         L_mean,
         L_max,
         L_entropy,
         L_variation,
         R_slope,
         R_mean,
         R_max,
         R_entropy,
         R_variation,
         Interviewer,
         Age,
         Age_Group,
         Gender,
         Gender_identity,
         Educational_level,
         Depression,
         Anxiety,
         Stress,
         Falls_number,
         Sleep,
         Walking,
         Physical_activity,
         Handedness,
         Snellen_left,
         Snellen_right,
         Visual_details,
         Aid_strength_left,
         Aid_strength_right
         )
```

## Filter data

```{r}
filtered.data <- clean.data %>%  filter(if_all(c(Performance,PerformanceSum, mean_blink_count, average_blink_duration, max_blink_duration, saccadic_count, average_saccadic_duration, maximum_saccadic_duration, fixation_count, average_fixation_duration, maximum_fixation_duration, gaze_entropy, L_entropy, R_entropy,L_mean,R_mean,L_max,R_max, BA,STE,GTE, L_variation,R_variation,L_slope,R_slope,Age , Gender, Educational_level,
         Depression,
         Anxiety,
         Stress,
         Falls_number,
         Sleep,
         Walking,
         Physical_activity,
         Handedness),~!is.na(.))) %>% 
  filter( isTransition!="Transition" & 
            (Task == "Training" | 
               Task == "Path Integration" | 
               Task == "Egocentric pointing" | 
               Task == "Perspective Taking")) %>% 
  mutate(Task = factor(case_when(isTransition=="Transition"~"Transition",
                                 T~Task),
                       levels = c("Transition","Training",
                                  "Path Integration","Egocentric pointing",
                                  "Perspective Taking"))) %>% 
  mutate(Task = gsub(" ", "_", Task),
         Decades = Age/10,
         Education = case_when(Educational_level == "No formal education"~0,
                               Educational_level=="High school"~1,
                               Educational_level=="University degree"~2,T~NA_real_),
         DAS = Depression + Anxiety + Stress) %>%dummy_cols(select_columns = "Task") #%>% mutate_if(is.numeric, ~(scale(.) %>% as.vector))


saveRDS(filtered.data,file="filtered.RDS")
saveRDS(clean.data,file="clean.RDS")


inter.data <- clean.data %>%  filter(if_all(c(Performance,PerformanceSum, mean_blink_count, average_blink_duration, max_blink_duration, saccadic_count, average_saccadic_duration, maximum_saccadic_duration, fixation_count, average_fixation_duration, maximum_fixation_duration, gaze_entropy, L_entropy, R_entropy,L_mean,R_mean,L_max,R_max, BA,STE,GTE, L_variation,R_variation,L_slope,R_slope,Age , Gender, Educational_level,
         Depression,
         Anxiety,
         Stress,
         Falls_number,
         Sleep,
         Walking,
         Physical_activity,
         Handedness),~!is.na(.))) %>% filter( isTransition=="Transition" )
```
